title: Wake Up
lyrics: A little too high, yeah, a little too high, a little too high Sometimes I sit and wonder why, oh wow I got this far And I'm not recording, oh I am, just remember that next time Oh I am, am I him? Sitting back with people that you've known for decades long Beyond the shadow of doubt, cross your mind Beyond the end when you see it coming up, my friend When we wake up and see, could've been doing it for us, yeah When we wake up and find ourselves in the next life or in this one When we wake up and let stars shine down on the things that we could've seen At least we'll have these memories of being seen, at least once Cause you know when you help out there for the help you got inside You think that you give the same story inside you Progress inside the friends that you give help to Sometimes you don't see results, frustration encapsulates Did it takes over, known, have you got a mistake or are you just Over the hill and pass a mind in your own thing that you wanna do But if you just squint a little bit further you'll see It's still capable of dreams, yeah When we wake up and find, the time we wasted wasn't time wasted wasted Hey when we wake up we're fine, at the time wasted wasn't wasted wasted time Wake up and find, that the time wasted wasn't wasted Was it wasted when we're wasted or was it wasted time I don't know which way to contemplate that All I know is good times and good vibes and roles make the whole story go Without those then it would just be suffering in a Hole you know of existence where mistakes cross your path Get a different perspective and you can't argue that When we wake up to understand that's what makes us unique Then we'll be set free From our own heartaches and critical thoughts Encapsulated over and over and over again Wrongs and failures and times of what we could have done right All the parentheses inside the question mark Punctuation on the heart All the questions you reside And do they reside inside of us saying that we have to justify our life Justify our lives Do we wake up my friend and be enough for us I said it's up to us up to us to find the Everest inside of us Maybe go past articulate and understand Cooperation's our fault Cooperation's of Our own Devices in town fall When we wake up, wake up, wake up, wake up, wake up, wake up Cause the sky's the limit And we wake up, wake up, wake up And I drown And I'll be sunken to the ground To the ground When we wake up When we wake up I think you should wake up Wake up bro, bro, bro, bro You're fucking late You're live or not bro I think you're fucking late You're gonna miss your appointment bro, wake up
